queries.question: Show me the oldest artifact uncovered.
queries.sql: SELECT Artifacts_Uncovered FROM Artifacts ORDER BY EstimatedAge DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?artifacts_uncovered WHERE {
  ?artifacts a :Artifacts .
  ?artifacts p:Artifacts_Uncovered ?artifacts_uncovered .
  ?artifacts p:EstimatedAge ?estimatedage_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?estimatedage_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show me the oldest ancient remains.
queries.sql: SELECT Ancient_Remains FROM Artifacts ORDER BY EstimatedAge DESC LIMIT 1

queries.question: show me archaeological sites and artefacts uncovered for the the top 2 artefacts ordered by estimated age in ascending order
queries.sql: SELECT Artifacts_Uncovered, Archaeological_Site FROM Artifacts ORDER BY EstimatedAge ASC LIMIT 2
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?artifacts_uncovered ?archaeological_site WHERE {
  ?artifacts a :Artifacts .
  ?artifacts p:Artifacts_Uncovered ?artifacts_uncovered .
  ?artifacts p:Archaeological_Site ?archaeological_site .
  ?artifacts p:EstimatedAge ?estimatedage_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?estimatedage_o)
LIMIT 2

  ?artifacts p:Ancient_Remains ?ancient_remains .
  ?artifacts p:Archaeological_Site ?archaeological_site .
  ?artifacts p:EstimatedAge ?estimatedage_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?estimatedage_o)
LIMIT 2

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the oldest artifact findings.
Show me the findings and sites of the two youngest artifacts.
